hero.headline: The retrieval layer you don't have to build.
hero.subtitle: klay+ handles ingestion, chunking, embedding, and retrieval so your team can focus on the application. Composable, self-hostable, and built for iteration.

p1.title: The pipeline is the hard part
p1.problem: Wiring together embedding models, vector stores, and chunking strategies is surprisingly complex. You spend more time on plumbing than on your actual application.
p1.solution: klay+ gives you a complete ingestion-to-retrieval pipeline out of the box. Plug in your documents and start querying in minutes.

p2.title: Every project is different
p2.problem: A support bot needs different chunking than a legal search tool. One embedding model doesn't fit every use case. But swapping components means rewriting the pipeline.
p2.solution: klay+ is composable by design. Swap storage, embedding, and chunking strategies without changing your application code.

p3.title: Retrieval quality is hard to improve
p3.problem: Your retrieval isn't good enough, but re-indexing everything with a new strategy is expensive and risky. You can't experiment without downtime.
p3.solution: klay+ lets you generate new projections side-by-side. Test different chunking or embedding strategies without touching your existing index.

c1.title: Ingest anything
c1.desc: Feed in PDFs, Markdown, HTML, or plain text. klay+ normalizes and prepares your content for processing — no format wrangling required.

c2.title: Smart chunking
c2.desc: Split documents using recursive, sentence-aware, fixed-size, or custom strategies. Match the chunking to your retrieval needs, not the other way around.

c3.title: Flexible embedding
c3.desc: Choose from OpenAI, Cohere, local models via WebLLM, or hash-based embeddings for fast development. Switch providers without re-architecting.

c4.title: Semantic retrieval
c4.desc: Query by meaning, not keywords. Get results ranked by relevance scores so your application always surfaces the most useful content.

infra.title: Pick your stack. We handle the glue.
infra.subtitle: Every component is swappable. Start with what's easy, evolve to what's right for production.
infra.note: More providers and strategies coming soon. The architecture is designed to grow with you.

search.title: See retrieval in action
search.query: What are the refund policy conditions?

supportBot.name: Enterprise Support Bot
supportBot.story: A fintech team ingested 500+ policy documents and had semantic retrieval running in an afternoon. Their support bot now resolves 60% of tickets without human intervention.

knowledgeAgent.name: Internal Knowledge Agent
knowledgeAgent.story: An engineering org indexed their runbooks, RFCs, and onboarding docs. New hires now find answers in seconds instead of pinging Slack channels.

legalAnalysis.name: Legal Document Analysis
legalAnalysis.story: A legaltech startup iterated on chunking strategies until they hit 95% retrieval relevance for contract clause extraction. No re-architecture needed.

ctaFinal.headline: Ready to build your retrieval layer?
ctaFinal.subtitle: Join the waitlist and be the first to try klay+ when it launches.
ctaFinal.note: No spam. We'll only email you when klay+ is ready.
